title: The Castle Crashers Mod
description: A mod that adds the world of The Behemoth's Castle Crashers to Minecraft!
body:
# -This mod requires GECKOLIB to play.

This mod adds the knights, enemies, bosses, and animals of the first 13 levels of Behemoth's Castle Crashers!

## This mod includes:

- A brand new dimension, which can be accessed by making a portal with Crystal Shard Blocks, which can be made from 4 Crystal Clumps, and lit by a Crystal Shard, which can be made by 2 Crystal Clumps.

- Currently 3 new biomes:
Barbarian Valley
Thieves' Forest
Grassy Fields

- Many allies and enemies.
- New armor!
- Animal Orbs! Which can be tamed with Collars, found in the Home Castle.
- Many new structures.
- 8 new bosses.

CREDITS!
Making the original Castle Crashers - The Behemoth

everything else - MarceloGToonz

 

[JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER RAH!!](https://discord.gg/cpJS4X77wF)
